ddls:
CREATE TABLE "tax_rates" (
  "rate_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each tax rate */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the tax category */,
  "rate_value" REAL /* Value of the tax rate (e.g., 26.5) */,
  "effective_date" TEXT /* Date when the tax rate becomes effective */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* Date when the tax rate ends */,
  "reference" TEXT /* Reference to the official source or documentation */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the rate is currently active */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments about the rate */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("rate_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_tax_rates_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("category_id") REFERENCES tax_categories ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "tax_categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each tax category */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the tax category (e.g., Corporate Tax Rate) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the tax category */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the category is currently active */,
  "parent_category_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the parent category (for hierarchical categories) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "social_security_rates" (
  "rate_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each social security rate */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the social security category */,
  "rate_value" REAL /* Value of the social security rate (e.g., 14.38) */,
  "effective_date" TEXT /* Date when the social security rate becomes effective */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* Date when the social security rate ends */,
  "reference" TEXT /* Reference to the official source or documentation */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the rate is currently active */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments about the rate */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("rate_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_social_security_rates_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("category_id") REFERENCES social_security_categories ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "social_security_categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each social security category */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the social security category (e.g., Social Security Rate) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the social security category */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the category is currently active */,
  "parent_category_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the parent category (for hierarchical categories) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "rate_history" (
  "history_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each rate change */,
  "rate_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the rate that changed */,
  "previous_value" REAL /* Value of the rate before the change */,
  "change_date" TEXT /* Date when the rate changed */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* Date when the previous rate ends */,
  "reason" TEXT /* Reason for the change */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the historical record is currently active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("history_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_rate_history_rate_id FOREIGN KEY ("rate_id") REFERENCES tax_rates ("rate_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_rate_history_rate_id FOREIGN KEY ("rate_id") REFERENCES social_security_rates ("rate_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "rate_forecasts" (
  "forecast_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each rate forecast */,
  "rate_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the rate being forecasted */,
  "forecast_value" REAL /* Predicted value of the rate */,
  "forecast_date" TEXT /* Date of the forecast */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* Date when the forecast ends */,
  "forecast_model" TEXT /* Model used for the forecast */,
  "confidence_level" REAL /* Confidence level of the forecast */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the forecast is currently active */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments about the forecast */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("forecast_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_rate_forecasts_rate_id FOREIGN KEY ("rate_id") REFERENCES tax_rates ("rate_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_rate_forecasts_rate_id FOREIGN KEY ("rate_id") REFERENCES social_security_rates ("rate_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "rate_references" (
  "reference_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each reference */,
  "rate_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the rate */,
  "document_type" TEXT /* Type of the document (e.g., PDF, HTML) */,
  "document_url" TEXT /* URL to the document */,
  "document_description" TEXT /* Description of the document */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the reference is currently active */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments about the reference */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("reference_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_rate_references_rate_id FOREIGN KEY ("rate_id") REFERENCES tax_rates ("rate_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_rate_references_rate_id FOREIGN KEY ("rate_id") REFERENCES social_security_rates ("rate_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., admin, analyst) */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the user belongs to */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the user is currently active */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date of the last login */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for security */,
  "is_admin" INTEGER /* Indicates if the user has administrative privileges */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_role FOREIGN KEY ("role") REFERENCES user_roles ("role_name"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_department FOREIGN KEY ("department") REFERENCES user_departments ("department_name")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role (e.g., admin, analyst) */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* Permissions associated with the role (e.g., read, write, delete) */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the role is currently active */,
  "permissions_json" TEXT /* Permissions stored in JSON format for more flexibility */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_departments" (
  "department_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each department */,
  "department_name" TEXT /* Name of the department (e.g., Finance, Economics) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the department */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the department is currently active */,
  "parent_department_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the parent department (for hierarchical departments) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("department_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "rate_changes" (
  "change_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each rate change */,
  "rate_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the rate that was changed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user who made the change */,
  "change_type" TEXT /* Type of change (e.g., update, delete) */,
  "change_date" TEXT /* Date when the change was made */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Notes or comments about the change */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the change record is currently active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("change_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_rate_changes_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_rate_changes_rate_id FOREIGN KEY ("rate_id") REFERENCES tax_rates ("rate_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "rate_requests" (
  "request_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each rate request */,
  "rate_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the rate being requested for a change */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user who made the request */,
  "request_date" TEXT /* Date when the request was made */,
  "proposed_change" TEXT /* Proposed change (e.g., new rate value) */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the request (e.g., pending, approved, rejected) */,
  "reviewer_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user who reviewed the request */,
  "approved_by" INTEGER /* Reference to the user who approved the request */,
  "approved_date" TEXT /* Date when the request was approved */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Notes or comments about the request */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the request is currently active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("request_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_rate_requests_approved_by FOREIGN KEY ("approved_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_rate_requests_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_rate_requests_rate_id FOREIGN KEY ("rate_id") REFERENCES tax_rates ("rate_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_rate_requests_reviewer_id FOREIGN KEY ("reviewer_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "rate_comments" (
  "comment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each comment */,
  "rate_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the rate the comment is about */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user who made the comment */,
  "comment_date" TEXT /* Date when the comment was made */,
  "comment_text" TEXT /* Text of the comment */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the comment is currently active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("comment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_rate_comments_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_rate_comments_rate_id FOREIGN KEY ("rate_id") REFERENCES tax_rates ("rate_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "rate_notifications" (
  "notification_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each notification */,
  "rate_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the rate the notification is about */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user who received the notification */,
  "notification_date" TEXT /* Date when the notification was sent */,
  "notification_type" TEXT /* Type of notification (e.g., email, SMS) */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the notification (e.g., sent, read, unread) */,
  "sent_by" INTEGER /* Reference to the user who sent the notification */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the notification is currently active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("notification_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_rate_notifications_sent_by FOREIGN KEY ("sent_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_rate_notifications_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_rate_notifications_rate_id FOREIGN KEY ("rate_id") REFERENCES tax_rates ("rate_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "rate_reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "report_name" TEXT /* Name of the report */,
  "report_type" TEXT /* Type of the report (e.g., PDF, Excel) */,
  "report_date" TEXT /* Date when the report was generated */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* File path to the report */,
  "file_size" REAL /* Size of the report file in MB */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* Reference to the user who created the report */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the report was created */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the report is currently active */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments about the report */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_rate_reports_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
